title: Reasonably priced good looking Eva shirts
display_title: Reasonably priced good looking Eva shirts
wikitext:
[]: Reasonably priced, good-looking Eva shirts?!             Quote Post by 0x2eleven » Sun Aug 08, 2010 7:07 am Uniqlo, a Japanese retailer with branches throughout the world, has begun selling t-shirts to celebrate Evangelion 2.0. They look pretty cool too. No more crappy Evangelion T-shirts from Ebay and overpriced Japanese imports from the official Eva store! Want one? Head over to Uniqlo UK's website , or if you happen to be near one of their stores, go there and buy one. I don't think their one US location in NY is selling the tees. If you know Chinese, Japanese, or whatever else, you can also go to those localized versions of the site and place your order. They have other anime shirts too if you're interested.

[]:             Quote Post by dropper » Sun Aug 08, 2010 1:09 pm I bought a couple eva shirts a month ago from this website, they are really great! Unfortunately most of them have sold out, there were around 8 or so to choose from originally! There was a Galaxy Express, Ping Pong club and One Piece shirt that I wanted from Uniqlo while I was buying, however the Large size was already sold out so I had no luck =( If you can't find the shirt your after from Uniqlo UK, try eBay or Yahoo auctions Japan, I have seen a few of the sold out ones there! All in all, these are great t-shirts, high quality and very comfortable!!

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Mon Aug 09, 2010 3:43 am Using some of my wallpapers/PSDs, I can have one made at the nearest custom T-shirt shop down at the mall.

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Mon Aug 09, 2010 4:03 am soul.assassin wrote: Using some of my wallpapers/PSDs, I can have one made at the nearest custom T-shirt shop down at the mall.

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Mon Aug 09, 2010 11:16 am AngelNo13Bardiel wrote: That reminds me, I need to get a few made myself. Always a good way to advertise, y'know...

[]:             Quote Post by giuliano » Mon Aug 09, 2010 12:59 pm That's pretty cool, I had no idea there were any Eva t-shirts in the UK, not a bad price at all compared to some of the Japanese ones. I'll probably get the black one with Eva 01 shrouded in smoke. Thanks for pointing the site out. I really wanted this design, but didn't manage to get one before they sold out in Japan :( http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=108

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue Nov 02, 2010 8:25 am Sorry for dredging this up, but this made me http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=106

[]:             Quote Post by Chrad » Tue Nov 02, 2010 9:56 am soul.assassin wrote: Sorry for dredging this up, but this made me http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=106

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Nov 02, 2010 10:44 am soul.assassin wrote: Sorry for dredging this up, but this made me http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=106

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Wed Nov 03, 2010 1:10 am I have some favorites, though: the Rockin'Jellybean rendition of Asuka in the Test Plugsuit, the RNASweat crossbones-and-skulls (reminds me of the Vietnam War-era Mike Force emblem), and an apparent riff on official Ranka Lee art (with Asuka straddling a heart-shaped headset clip). RockinJellyBean Asuka: http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=204 RNASweat "Jolly Roger": http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=193 Ranka Lee Riff Asuka (lol): http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=70 For Angel13Bardiel, this Iron Maiden-themed shirt is just right: http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=153

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Nov 05, 2010 3:36 am I always wanted to have some custom-made Evangelion jerseys made up, but I doubt that the price would be very good unless I could order in bulk. Also, the jersey printing services I've seen so far haven't really looked like they'd do justice to the concept. Who knows, maybe if there were enough people who wanted these that would cover the expense then I'd actually consider making some up and selling them.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Fri Nov 05, 2010 1:09 pm soul.assassin wrote: Sorry for dredging this up, but this made me http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=106

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Fri Nov 05, 2010 4:20 pm soul.assassin wrote: Ranka Lee Riff Asuka (lol): http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=70

[]:             Quote Post by arkiel » Wed Nov 10, 2010 3:57 pm I want this on a black shirt. Anyone seen it about? My zombified Captain America shirt isn't getting spit-takes anymore.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Nov 11, 2010 7:41 pm arkiel wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Thu Nov 11, 2010 8:33 pm

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Sun Nov 21, 2010 11:09 am those last two shirts are awesome . does anyone know if these are still available anywhere and not UBER expensive? angel shirts

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Wed Nov 24, 2010 7:03 pm soul.assassin wrote: Sorry for dredging this up, but this made me http://www.eva-t.jp/products/detail.php?product_id=106
